name: Helen Mayberg, MD
title: Neurologist and Neuroscientist
affiliation: Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai / NY
relevance: Globally renowned for mapping depression circuits in the brain and discovering biomarkers used to guide treatments like Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) for severe, treatment resistant MDD
notes: e.g. Often quoted on antidepressant augmentation

name: Nolan Williams, MD
title: Associate Professor
relevance: Developed the Stanford Accelerated Intelligent Neuromodulation Therapy (SAINT), a highly personalized, accelerated TMS protocol for treatment-resistant depression
notes: e.g. Often quoted on antidepressant augmentation

name: Raymond Lam, MD
title: Professor of Psychiatry
relevance: Leading expert in clinical trials for new antidepressants and the development of clinical guidelines for MDD
notes: e.g. Often quoted on antidepressant augmentation

name: Maurizio Fava, MD
title: Psychiatrist-in-Chief
relevance: He one of the world's foremost clinical researchers on treatment-resistant depression and experimental therapeutics
notes: e.g. Often quoted on antidepressant augmentation

name: Carlos Zarate, MD
title: Chief of the Section on Neurobiology and Treatment of Mood Disorders
affiliation: National Institute of Mental Health / MD
relevance: His work has been instrumental in evaluating the rapid antidepressant effects of ketamine and other novel glutamatergic modulators
notes: e.g. Often quoted on antidepressant augmentation
